landing.heroDesc: Unlock the culture, study through your favorite songs, and master the language with a dynamic, modern method focused on real fluency.
landing.methodDesc: We use an interactive system inspired by native media immersion. Absorb the language while enjoying content you love.
landing.method1Desc: Learn grammar in context by deciphering songs, anime, and real dialogues. The natural repetition of music reinforces vocabulary effectively.
landing.method2Desc: Understand when to be formal, when to use slang, and start communicating confidently from the very first lesson.
landing.method3Desc: Language and culture go hand in hand. Understand the history and thinking behind each kanji and idiomatic expression.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take the first step?
landing.ctaDesc: Get in touch to schedule a chat. Let's structure your ideal study plan tailored to your Japanese learning goals.

course.subtitle: Nihongo — Japanese Language
course.heroDesc: 文 46 characters · 📖 10 Row lessons · 🔀 5 Cumulative lessons · 📝 3 Reviews
course.pathTip: Open a Study & Learn lesson first to understand the writing system — then use the matching Practice exercises to drill recognition.

benefits.heroSubtitle: Our premium plan is designed to remove friction from your learning, helping you achieve Japanese fluency faster.

hearts.title: Learn without fear of mistakes
hearts.desc: With infinite hearts, you can make as many mistakes as you need. Mistakes are the best way to learn a new language.

noAds.title: Zero interruptions
noAds.desc: Keep your focus sharp. With the Premium plan, you will never see an ad interrupting your study flow.

offline.title: Study anywhere
offline.desc: Taking a flight or riding the subway? Download your lessons in advance and keep your streak alive even without the internet.

xp.title: XP Boosts & Insights
xp.desc: Earn bonus XP on weekends and get detailed insights into which Kanji or Grammar points you need to practice more.

shop.pageSubtitle: Expand your study toolkit with curated ebooks, guides, and audio courses crafted for Japanese learners.

shop.paymentMethods: We accept: Visa · Mastercard · Bitcoin · Ethereum · and more

ebook1.title: Japanese Ebook Vol. 1
ebook1.desc: Master the first 20 essential Kanji with stroke order, on'yomi & kun'yomi readings, and example sentences.

ebook2.title: Japanese Ebook Vol. 2
ebook2.desc: Kanji 21–40 with advanced readings, compound vocabulary, and real-world usage examples.

n5Grammar.title: N5 Grammar Guide
n5Grammar.desc: Complete JLPT N5 grammar reference with explanations, conjugation tables, and practice exercises.

vocabulary.title: Japanese Vocabulary Builder
vocabulary.desc: 1,000 essential words organized by topic with furigana, romaji, and example sentences.

phrasebook.title: Japanese Phrasebook
phrasebook.desc: 500+ practical phrases for travel, shopping, business meetings, and everyday conversation.

audioCourse.title: Japanese Audio Course
audioCourse.desc: Native speaker recordings for all JLPT N5 vocabulary and key phrases — perfect for commuters.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Welcome to OiTutor. These Terms of Service govern your use of our website and services. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully before proceeding.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By creating an account or using any part of our service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must not use our platform.

eligibility.title: User Eligibility and Accounts
eligibility.body: You must be at least 13 years of age to use our services. If you are under 18, you must have parental or guardian consent. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: All content on OiTutor, including lessons, exercises, audio, text, graphics, and software, is the property of OiTutor or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.

userConduct.title: User Conduct
userConduct.body: You agree not to misuse the platform, including but not limited to: attempting to gain unauthorized access, interfering with the proper operation of the service, scraping or collecting data without permission, or using the service for any unlawful purpose.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the service at our discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties, or for any other reason.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers & Limitation of Liability
disclaimers.body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. OiTutor shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the service.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the applicable laws of the jurisdiction in which OiTutor operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by posting a notice on our platform. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@example.com.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: OiTutor is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our website and services.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.body: We may collect personal information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and account credentials. We also automatically collect usage data including pages visited, time spent on lessons, exercise scores, and device/browser information.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.body: We use your information to provide and improve our language learning services, personalize your experience, track your learning progress, communicate updates, and ensure the security of our platform. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and analyze how our service is used. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences, though some features may not function properly without them.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.body: We may use third-party services such as Supabase for authentication and data storage, and analytics tools to understand usage patterns. These services have their own privacy policies governing how they handle your data.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit and at rest. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

childrenPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.body: Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it promptly.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also request a copy of your data or ask us to restrict its processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email provided below.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by posting a notice on our platform. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at support@example.com.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The people behind OiTutor — passionate about AI, education, and the Japanese language.

productLead.name: Product Lead
productLead.bio: Coordinates curriculum direction, learner experience, and AI-assisted study workflows for the platform.

engineeringLead.name: Engineering Lead
engineeringLead.bio: Builds and maintains the web app, lesson engine, backend integrations, and quality workflows.
